hero.title: Industrial automation products, ready to buy or quote.
hero.subtitle: Buy samples, accessories, and clear SKUs online. For configured systems, lead-time checks, certifications, or custom projects, request a quote before ordering.
hero.panel.title: Built for B2B purchasing
hero.panel.b1: Buy Now for samples, accessories, and clear SKUs.
hero.panel.b2: Request a Quote for volume, lead time, certification, or customization.
hero.panel.b3: Contact Engineer for parameter selection and deployment guidance.
spotlight.title: Featured industrial products
spotlight.subtitle: A quote-first B2B product window for fast browsing, SKU comparison, and engineer-supported procurement.
cats.title: Industrial automation only
cats.subtitle: The store stays focused on GYUTRON's industrial brand: cameras, lighting, sensors, scanners, PDA terminals, optics, cards, robot accessories, and test equipment.
trust.shipping.title: Global Shipping
trust.shipping.body: International courier and freight options are confirmed by destination, product type, and order size.
trust.warranty.title: Warranty Support
trust.warranty.body: Industrial warranty coverage is documented by product line and confirmed before shipment.
trust.return.title: Return Review
trust.return.body: Returns and replacements follow product condition, configuration, and procurement terms.
trust.docs.title: Certified Documents
trust.docs.body: Datasheets, compliance documents, and quote records can be prepared for procurement teams.
footer.brand.title: GYUTRON Official Store
footer.brand.body: Official purchasing entrance for GYUTRON industrial automation hardware and accessories.
products.seo.title: Products | GYUTRON Official Store
products.seo.desc: Browse GYUTRON industrial cameras, sensors, scanners, PDA terminals, lighting, lenses, acquisition cards, robot accessories, and test equipment.
products.title: Shop industrial automation hardware.
products.copy: Filter focused B2B categories. Use Buy Now for simple orders, or request a quote for configuration, documentation, stock, and lead-time confirmation.
product.seo.title: Product Detail | GYUTRON Official Store
product.seo.desc: GYUTRON official store product detail with buy now, request a quote, and contact engineer options.
cart.seo.title: Cart | GYUTRON Official Store
cart.title: Your purchasing cart.
cart.copy: Shipping, duties, payment terms, and lead time are confirmed during checkout review for industrial orders.
checkout.seo.title: Checkout | GYUTRON Official Store
checkout.seo.desc: GYUTRON checkout request for industrial product orders.
checkout.title: Confirm purchasing details.
checkout.intro: Submit your purchase request and our team will confirm availability, shipping terms, payment method, and final quotation before processing the order.
checkout.notice: After you submit this request, a GYUTRON representative will contact you to confirm stock, lead time, shipping, and payment before any charge is made.
ph.procurementNotes: Lead time, certification, tax ID, shipping account, customization, or application notes.
account.seo.title: Account Registration | GYUTRON Official Store
account.seo.desc: Create a GYUTRON official store account for B2B purchasing, quote requests, order history, and engineering support.
account.title: Create a purchasing account.
account.copy: Use one account to prepare sample orders, request quotes, keep company purchasing details ready, and coordinate engineering support before industrial products ship.
ph.purchasingNotes: Optional: target product, quantity range, country, certification, or lead-time needs.
account.notice: This registration form is a front-end prototype until the commerce account system is connected.
quote.seo.title: Request a Quote | GYUTRON Official Store
quote.title: Get pricing, lead time, and procurement terms.
quote.copy: Use this for volume purchases, uncertain model selection, compliance documents, accessories, and shipping review.
ph.appRequirements: Application, interface, environment, certifications, packaging, lead time, or target budget.
ceng.seo.title: Contact Engineer | GYUTRON Official Store
ceng.title: Confirm the right industrial product before ordering.
ceng.copy: For machine vision, sensors, RFID, scanners, or integration questions, send your environment and workflow details.
ph.techQuestion: Part size, speed, distance, code type, lighting, interface, environment, or existing equipment.
cus.seo.title: Contact Us | GYUTRON Official Store
cus.title: Purchasing, quotes, and support.
cus.copy: Email info@gyutron.com or use WhatsApp +852 69509801 for order, quote, and product questions.
form.name: Name
about.seo.title: About Us | GYUTRON Official Store
about.title: Official purchasing entrance for GYUTRON industrial hardware.
about.c1.title: Industrial Focus
about.c1.body: GYUTRON focuses on rugged data capture, sensing, machine vision, inspection, and connected automation hardware.
about.c2.title: B2B Procurement
about.c2.body: The store supports samples, accessories, small-batch purchases, quote requests, and engineering confirmation before order release.
about.c3.title: Brand Website
about.c3.body: For company, solution, and technical capability information, visit www.gyutron.com.
pm.seo.title: Payment Methods | GYUTRON Official Store
pm.title: Designed for online payment and B2B procurement terms.
pm.c1.title: Credit Card
pm.c2.title: PayPal
pm.c2.body: Useful for samples, small accessories, and international buyers.
pm.c3.title: Wire Transfer
pm.c3.body: Suitable for B2B orders and proforma invoice workflows.
pm.c4.title: Quote First
pm.c4.body: Used when shipping, lead time, or configuration must be confirmed before payment.
ship.seo.title: Shipping Policy | GYUTRON Official Store
ship.title: Shipping is confirmed by product and destination.
ship.c1.title: Courier And Freight
ship.c1.body: Small products may ship by courier. Larger or configured industrial orders may require freight review.
ship.c2.title: Lead Time
ship.c2.body: Stock and production lead time are confirmed before payment capture or proforma invoice release.
ship.c3.title: Duties And Taxes
ship.c3.body: Import duties, taxes, and customs requirements are the buyer's responsibility unless otherwise agreed.
rr.seo.title: Return & Refund Policy | GYUTRON Official Store
rr.title: Returns are reviewed against industrial order conditions.
rr.c1.title: Eligibility
rr.c1.body: Standard unopened items may be reviewed for return. Customized, configured, or used industrial products may be excluded.
rr.c2.title: RMA Review
rr.c2.body: Contact support before returning any item. Unauthorized returns may be rejected.
rr.c3.title: Refund Timing
rr.c3.body: Approved refunds are processed after inspection and according to the original payment method or invoice terms.
tos.seo.title: Terms of Service | GYUTRON Official Store
tos.title: Industrial purchases may require review before fulfillment.
tos.c1.title: Order Acceptance
tos.c1.body: Orders may require stock, export, configuration, or certification review before acceptance.
tos.c2.title: Product Information
tos.c2.body: Specifications, prices, and lead times can change before final confirmation or proforma invoice.
tos.c3.title: Business Use
tos.c3.body: The store is intended for industrial and B2B procurement, not unrelated consumer purchases.
war.seo.title: Warranty Policy | GYUTRON Official Store
war.title: Warranty coverage is confirmed by product line.
war.c1.title: Coverage
war.c1.body: Standard warranty terms depend on product type, configuration, and purchase agreement.
war.c2.title: Exclusions
war.c2.body: Misuse, unauthorized repair, improper installation, and environmental damage may be excluded.
war.c3.title: Service Process
war.c3.body: Contact support with order details, serial number, fault description, and application environment.
priv.seo.title: Privacy Policy | GYUTRON Official Store
priv.title: We use purchasing data to support B2B orders and inquiries.
priv.c1.title: Information Collected
priv.c1.body: Contact, company, shipping, inquiry, and order details may be collected when you submit forms or checkout requests.
priv.c2.title: Use Of Data
priv.c2.body: Data is used for quotes, order review, support, shipment coordination, and procurement communication.
priv.c3.title: Third Parties
priv.c3.body: Payment, shipping, CRM, and ecommerce providers may process data after platform integration.
cart.empty: Your cart is empty. Add sample items or accessories from the official store.
